title: Encoding and decoding with refinement of the reconstructed picture
abstract: Refinement data are encoded in a bitstream. The refinement data are determined such that a rate distortion cost is decreased compared to a rate distortion cost computed which is computed based on whether no mapping applies before coding, on whether mapping applies before coding and the refinement is out of the decoding loop, on whether mapping applies before coding and the refinement is in the decoding loop.
